title: Union Health Minister Reviews Dengue Preparedness in Delhi
summary: Union Health Minister Shri J.P. Nadda chaired a high-level review meeting on July 1, 2026, to assess dengue prevention and control in Delhi. The session focused on epidemiological trends, hospital readiness, and vector control. The Minister emphasized proactive surveillance and 'Jan Chetna through Jan Bhagidari' to strengthen the National Strategy for Prevention and Control of Dengue across the national capital.

title: Review of TB Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan in Delhi
summary: Union Health Minister Shri J.P. Nadda reviewed the TB Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan in Delhi on July 1, 2026. Key achievements include screening 28.83 lakh people, 21.67 lakh chest X-rays, 3.65 lakh molecular tests, and notifying 1.75 lakh TB patients. The Minister urged greater community participation and 'Jan Bhagidari' from public representatives to bridge the gap between health efforts and elimination outcomes.
